behavior.name: Test Detection Only
behavior.author: Gabriel Novas
behavior.description:
Test behavior ONLY for detection and calibration.
Requires that the following already exist: - Images in /calibrations/extrinsic_calibration/pictures/ - Poses in /calibrations/extrinsic_calibration/robot_poses/ - Camera intrinsic calibration in /calibrations/intrinsic_calibration/calibration.yaml
FLOW: 1. Process_Offline: Detects Charuco in saved images - Reads images and poses - Saves detections in /calibrations/extrinsic_calibration/charuco_table_poses/
2. Compute_Calibration: Calculates calibration with VISP - Uses VISP to calculate camera-robot transformation - Saves result in /calibrations/camera_extrinsics.yaml
FINAL RESULTS: - /home/drims/calibrations/camera_extrinsics.yaml (main calibration) - /home/drims/calibrations/extrinsic_calibration/charuco_table_poses/ (intermediate detections)

param.name: calibration_file_name
param.label: Calibration File
param.hint: Output file name (will be saved in base folder)
